nasb.text: And even the one who is valiant, whose heart is like the heart of a lion, will completely lose heart; for all Israel knows that your father is a mighty man and those who are with him are valiant men.

esv.text: Then even the valiant man, whose heart is like the heart of a lion, will utterly melt with fear, for all Israel knows that your father is a mighty man, and that those who are with him are valiant men.

cnv.text: 那時，縱使有人像獅子一般勇敢，心裡也必驚慌，因為全以色列都知道你父親是個勇士，跟隨他的人都是英勇的人。

ccb.text: 那时候，你手下的人再胆量过人，也会胆战心惊。因为全以色列都知道你父亲是英雄，他的部下都是勇士。
